steps.title: Express perimeter of the base in terms of width
steps.content:
The width is $x$ inches and the length is $2.5x$ inches. The perimeter of a rectangle is $2(\text{length} + \text{width})$, so:
$$\text{Perimeter} = 2(2.5x + x) = 2(3.5x) = 7x \text{ inches}$$

steps.title: Set up the inequality from the shipping restriction
steps.content:
The restriction requires that perimeter of base + height $\leq$ 130 inches. With height = 60:
$$7x + 60 \leq 130$$

steps.title: Solve for the allowable width
steps.content:
Subtract 60 from both sides:
$$7x \leq 70$$
Divide both sides by 7:
$$x \leq 10$$
Since width must be positive, the complete inequality is $0 < x \leq 10$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
